_meta.websockets: none — Magento 2 does not implement WebSocket endpoints

auth_notes.bearer_token: Customer bearer token: POST /rest/V1/integration/customer/token or generateCustomerToken mutation
auth_notes.admin_bearer_token: Admin bearer token: POST /rest/V1/integration/admin/token (then complete 2FA if configured)
auth_notes.session_cookie: Admin session cookie from browser login to /admin front-end

endpoints.notes: Returns plain quoted string — this IS the cartId

cartItem.notes: sku, qty required; quote_id is DERIVED from cart
sku, qty required; quote_id is DERIVED from cartId

input.notes: sku, ratings[].id, ratings[].value_id, nickname, summary, text
